name: Schroders plc
description: Schroders plc is a leading global investment management firm providing active asset management, advisory, and wealth management services. With a history spanning over two centuries, the company offers a broad range of capabilities across both public and private markets. Headquartered in London, Schroders serves a diverse client base, including institutions, high-net-worth individuals, and family offices. The firm is recognized for its commitment to sustainability and long-term investment outcomes, managing significant assets globally while operating with a focus on acting in the best interests of its clients, society, and the wider world.
